do_not_change_yet: Do not change bot config, route policy, trade permissions, panel scores, gates, registry phases, order execution, or live trading behavior from this review.

Do not loosen route locks, trade permission checks, daily PnL guard, source freshness enforcement, promotion gates, or no-parent-lineage handling.
Do not blend EXPERIMENT, ghost, review, or stale evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not tune giveback or profit-lock thresholds from the stale 2026-07-01 ledger.
Do not delete Mustard X outright; tighten evidence collection and collect clean forward samples first.
llm_call.model: {'primary': 'Codex recurring FEM Live LLM Call review', 'lenses': ['Quant Edge Agent', 'Execution Risk Agent', 'Contract Spine Agent', 'Auction + Options Agent']}
money_risks: Permission leakage: blocked or research-only routes may still reach order paths while route_lock_enforce and trade_permission_enforce are false.
Fill blindness: fills_checked is 0, so realized exposure cannot be fully trusted from packet evidence.
False confidence: ghost volume is huge and experiment evidence is quarantined while actual panel realized PnL is negative.
Stale protection evidence: giveback and gate effectiveness are from 2026-07-01 and should not drive live tuning.
Geometry risk: tiny target-R setups can look directionally correct but be untradeable after spread, slippage, and stop distance.
Map-context risk: gap/options agreement may look clean when maps are missing, stale, or not row-level conflict ranked.
open_questions: Which exact 3 blocked-route orders were checked, and did any reach broker execution?

Why is the 2026-07-19 Mustard forward source missing while the packet includes a Mustard snapshot?
Why does the Mustard summary report 39 candidates and 3 entered while only 12 embedded rows and one visible entered row are present?
Why does execution truth realized PnL report 0 while panel_score actual_realized_pnl reports -747.6951?
Can options-gap agreement show incremental realized or clean ghost R versus gap-only picks over at least 30 fresh forward samples?
Should reward_r below 0.25 be tagged context-only even when maps agree?
